parameters.query:
-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- REQUÊTE : SUIVI PÉRIODE D'ESSAI AVEC GESTION INITIALE + REDOUBLEMENT
-- VERSION COMPLÈTE : Inclut les informations du supérieur hiérarchique
--                  + Manager RH (≤10j) + Coordinatrice RH (≤15j)
-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

SELECT  
    -- ─── INFORMATIONS CONTRAT ───
    c.XNUM_0 as numero_contrat,
    c.XDAT_0 as date_fiche,
    c.XSAL_0 as code_salarie,
    c.XPESSAI_0 as code_periode_essaie,
    c.XPOST_0 as poste_salarie,

    c.CREUSR_0 as create_user, 
    c.CREDATTIM_0 as date_creation,
    
    -- ─── INFORMATIONS SALARIÉ ───
    s.XPRENOM_0 as prenom_salarie,
    s.XNAMSAL_0 as nom_salarie,
    s.XEMAIL_0 as email_salarie,
    s.XNTEL_0 as telephone_salarie,
    s.XDTE_0 as date_entree,
YEAR(s.XDTS_0) AS annee_sortie,
  s.YSUP_0 as code_superieur_hierarchique,
    (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE c.XSAL_0 = inf.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_salarie,
    (SELECT inf.LAN_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE c.XSAL_0 = inf.XSAL_0) AS langue_salarie,
    (SELECT inf.YBOT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE c.XSAL_0 = inf.XSAL_0) AS bot_salarie,
    
    u.XSAL_0 as code_utilisateur,
    
    -- ─── INFORMATIONS SUPÉRIEUR HIÉRARCHIQUE ───
    sup.XSAL_0 as code_superieur,
    sup.XPRENOM_0 as prenom_superieur,
    sup.XNAMSAL_0 as nom_superieur,
    sup.XEMAIL_0 as email_superieur,
    sup.XNTEL_0 as telephone_superieur,
    sup.ZPOSTE_0 as poste_superieur,
    (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE sup.XSAL_0 = inf.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_superieur,
    (SELECT inf.LAN_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE sup.XSAL_0 = inf.XSAL_0) AS langue_superieur,
    (SELECT inf.YBOT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE sup.XSAL_0 = inf.XSAL_0) AS bot_superieur,
    
    -- ─── PÉRIODE D'ESSAI (DYNAMIQUE DEPUIS APLSTD) ───
    pe.LANMES_0 as libelle_periode_essai,
    pe.LANNUM_0 as code_type_periode,
    
    -- ─── INDICATEUR DE PÉRIODE ───
    CASE 
        WHEN GETDATE() < CASE 
            WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 1 THEN DATEADD(month, 3, c.XDTE_0)
            WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 2 THEN DATEADD(day, 45, c.XDTE_0)
            WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 3 THEN DATEADD(day, 15, c.XDTE_0)
        END THEN 'INITIALE'
        ELSE 'REDOUBLEMENT'
    END as type_periode_actuelle,
    
    -- ─── CALCUL DURÉES SELON TYPE ───
    CASE 
        WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 1 THEN 3
        WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 2 THEN 1.5
        WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 3 THEN 0.5
    END as duree_essai_initial_mois,
    
    CASE 
        WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 1 THEN 6
        WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 2 THEN 3
        WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 3 THEN 1
    END as duree_essai_redoublement_mois,
    
    -- ─── DATES DE FIN PÉRIODE D'ESSAI ───
    CASE 
        WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 1 THEN DATEADD(month, 3, c.XDTE_0)
        WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 2 THEN DATEADD(day, 45, c.XDTE_0)
        WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 3 THEN DATEADD(day, 15, c.XDTE_0)
    END as date_fin_essai_initial,
    
    CASE 
        WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 1 THEN DATEADD(month, 6, c.XDTE_0)
        WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 2 THEN DATEADD(month, 3, c.XDTE_0)
        WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 3 THEN DATEADD(day, 30, c.XDTE_0)
    END as date_fin_essai_redoublement,
    
    -- ─── DATE DE FIN APPLICABLE (selon période actuelle) ───
    CASE 
        WHEN GETDATE() < CASE 
            WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 1 THEN DATEADD(month, 3, c.XDTE_0)
            WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 2 THEN DATEADD(day, 45, c.XDTE_0)
            WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 3 THEN DATEADD(day, 15, c.XDTE_0)
        END THEN 
            CASE 
                WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 1 THEN DATEADD(month, 3, c.XDTE_0)
                WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 2 THEN DATEADD(day, 45, c.XDTE_0)
                WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 3 THEN DATEADD(day, 15, c.XDTE_0)
            END
        ELSE 
            CASE 
                WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 1 THEN DATEADD(month, 6, c.XDTE_0)
                WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 2 THEN DATEADD(month, 3, c.XDTE_0)
                WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 3 THEN DATEADD(day, 30, c.XDTE_0)
            END
    END as date_fin_essai_applicable,
    
    -- ─── JOURS RESTANTS (selon période actuelle) ───
    DATEDIFF(DAY, GETDATE(), 
        CASE 
            WHEN GETDATE() < CASE 
                WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 1 THEN DATEADD(month, 3, c.XDTE_0)
                WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 2 THEN DATEADD(day, 45, c.XDTE_0)
                WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 3 THEN DATEADD(day, 15, c.XDTE_0)
            END THEN 
                CASE 
                    WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 1 THEN DATEADD(month, 3, c.XDTE_0)
                    WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 2 THEN DATEADD(day, 45, c.XDTE_0)
                    WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 3 THEN DATEADD(day, 15, c.XDTE_0)
                END
            ELSE 
                CASE 
                    WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 1 THEN DATEADD(month, 6, c.XDTE_0)
                    WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 2 THEN DATEADD(month, 3, c.XDTE_0)
                    WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 3 THEN DATEADD(day, 30, c.XDTE_0)
                END
        END
    ) as jours_restants,
    
    -- ─── NIVEAU D'ESCALADE (DYNAMIQUE selon jours restants) ───
    -- Logique : ≤10j → RESPO_RH + MANAGER_RH | ≤15j → RESPO_PERSONNEL_RECRUTEMENT + COORDINATRICE_RH
    CASE 
        WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, GETDATE(), 
            CASE 
                WHEN GETDATE() < CASE 
                    WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 1 THEN DATEADD(month, 3, c.XDTE_0)
                    WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 2 THEN DATEADD(day, 45, c.XDTE_0)
                    WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 3 THEN DATEADD(day, 15, c.XDTE_0)
                END THEN 
                    CASE 
                        WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 1 THEN DATEADD(month, 3, c.XDTE_0)
                        WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 2 THEN DATEADD(day, 45, c.XDTE_0)
                        WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 3 THEN DATEADD(day, 15, c.XDTE_0)
                    END
                ELSE 
                    CASE 
                        WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 1 THEN DATEADD(month, 6, c.XDTE_0)
                        WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 2 THEN DATEADD(month, 3, c.XDTE_0)
                        WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 3 THEN DATEADD(day, 30, c.XDTE_0)
                    END
            END
        ) <= 10 THEN 'RESPO_RH_MANAGER_RH'
        WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, GETDATE(), 
            CASE 
                WHEN GETDATE() < CASE 
                    WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 1 THEN DATEADD(month, 3, c.XDTE_0)
                    WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 2 THEN DATEADD(day, 45, c.XDTE_0)
                    WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 3 THEN DATEADD(day, 15, c.XDTE_0)
                END THEN 
                    CASE 
                        WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 1 THEN DATEADD(month, 3, c.XDTE_0)
                        WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 2 THEN DATEADD(day, 45, c.XDTE_0)
                        WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 3 THEN DATEADD(day, 15, c.XDTE_0)
                    END
                ELSE 
                    CASE 
                        WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 1 THEN DATEADD(month, 6, c.XDTE_0)
                        WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 2 THEN DATEADD(month, 3, c.XDTE_0)
                        WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 3 THEN DATEADD(day, 30, c.XDTE_0)
                    END
            END
        ) <= 15 THEN 'RESPO_PERSONNEL_RECRUTEMENT_COORDINATRICE_RH'
        ELSE 'OK'
    END as niveau_notification,
    
    -- ─── RESPONSABLE PERSONNEL ───
    rp.XSAL_0 as code_respo_personnel,
    rp.XPRENOM_0 as prenom_respo_personnel,
    rp.XNAMSAL_0 as nom_respo_personnel,
    rp.XEMAIL_0 as email_respo_personnel,
    (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE rp.XSAL_0 = inf.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_respo_personnel,
    (SELECT inf.LAN_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE rp.XSAL_0 = inf.XSAL_0) AS langue_respo_personnel,
    (SELECT inf.YBOT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE rp.XSAL_0 = inf.XSAL_0) AS bot_respo_personnel,
    
    -- ─── RESPONSABLE RECRUTEMENT ───
    rr.XSAL_0 as code_respo_recrutement,
    rr.XPRENOM_0 as prenom_respo_recrutement,
    rr.XNAMSAL_0 as nom_respo_recrutement,
    rr.XEMAIL_0 as email_respo_recrutement,
    (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE rr.XSAL_0 = inf.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_respo_recrutement,
    (SELECT inf.LAN_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE rr.XSAL_0 = inf.XSAL_0) AS langue_respo_recrutement,
    (SELECT inf.YBOT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE rr.XSAL_0 = inf.XSAL_0) AS bot_respo_recrutement,
    
    -- ─── RESPONSABLE RH ───
    rrh.XSAL_0 as code_respo_rh,
    rrh.XPRENOM_0 as prenom_respo_rh,
    rrh.XNAMSAL_0 as nom_respo_rh,
    rrh.XEMAIL_0 as email_respo_rh,
    (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE rrh.XSAL_0 = inf.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_respo_rh,
    (SELECT inf.LAN_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE rrh.XSAL_0 = inf.XSAL_0) AS langue_respo_rh,
    (SELECT inf.YBOT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE rrh.XSAL_0 = inf.XSAL_0) AS bot_respo_rh,

    -- ─── MANAGER RH (≤10j — même seuil que RESPO_RH) ───
    mrh.XSAL_0 as code_manager_rh,
    mrh.XPRENOM_0 as prenom_manager_rh,
    mrh.XNAMSAL_0 as nom_manager_rh,
    mrh.XEMAIL_0 as email_manager_rh,
    mrh.XNTEL_0 as telephone_manager_rh,
    (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE mrh.XSAL_0 = inf.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_manager_rh,
    (SELECT inf.LAN_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE mrh.XSAL_0 = inf.XSAL_0) AS langue_manager_rh,
    (SELECT inf.YBOT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE mrh.XSAL_0 = inf.XSAL_0) AS bot_manager_rh,

    -- ─── COORDINATRICE RH (≤15j — même seuil que RESPO_PERSONNEL_RECRUTEMENT) ───
    crh.XSAL_0 as code_coordinatrice_rh,
    crh.XPRENOM_0 as prenom_coordinatrice_rh,
    crh.XNAMSAL_0 as nom_coordinatrice_rh,
    crh.XEMAIL_0 as email_coordinatrice_rh,
    crh.XNTEL_0 as telephone_coordinatrice_rh,
    (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE crh.XSAL_0 = inf.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_coordinatrice_rh,
    (SELECT inf.LAN_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE crh.XSAL_0 = inf.XSAL_0) AS langue_coordinatrice_rh,
    (SELECT inf.YBOT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE crh.XSAL_0 = inf.XSAL_0) AS bot_coordinatrice_rh

FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XCONTR c
LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.YSALAUS u ON c.CREUSR_0 = u.USER_0
LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL s ON s.XSAL_0 = c.XSAL_0
LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL sup ON sup.XSAL_0 = s.YSUP_0 AND sup.XFLG_0 = 2
LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.APLSTD pe ON pe.LANCHP_0 = 6075 AND pe.LAN_0 = 'FRA' AND pe.LANNUM_0 = c.XPESSAI_0
LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.ZPOSTE p1 ON p1.YNUM_0 = 'PST00052'
LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL rr ON rr.ZPOSTE_0 = p1.YNUM_0 AND rr.XFLG_0 = 2
LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.ZPOSTE p2 ON p2.YNUM_0 = 'PST00060'
LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL rp ON rp.ZPOSTE_0 = p2.YNUM_0 AND rp.XFLG_0 = 2
LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.ZPOSTE p3 ON p3.YNUM_0 = 'PST00187'
LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL rrh ON rrh.ZPOSTE_0 = p3.YNUM_0 AND rrh.XFLG_0 = 2
-- ── Nouveau : Manager RH ── remplace 'PST_MANAGER_RH' par le vrai code poste
LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.ZPOSTE p4 ON p4.YNUM_0 = 'PST00186'
LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL mrh ON mrh.ZPOSTE_0 = p4.YNUM_0 AND mrh.XFLG_0 = 2
-- ── Nouveau : Coordinatrice RH ── remplace 'PST_COORDINATRICE_RH' par le vrai code poste
LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.ZPOSTE p5 ON p5.YNUM_0 = 'PST00188'
LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL crh ON crh.ZPOSTE_0 = p5.YNUM_0 AND crh.XFLG_0 = 2

WHERE
    CASE 
        WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 1 THEN DATEADD(month, 6, c.XDTE_0)
        WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 2 THEN DATEADD(month, 3, c.XDTE_0)
        WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 3 THEN DATEADD(day, 30, c.XDTE_0)
    END >= GETDATE()
    AND DATEDIFF(DAY, GETDATE(), 
        CASE 
            WHEN GETDATE() < CASE 
                WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 1 THEN DATEADD(month, 3, c.XDTE_0)
                WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 2 THEN DATEADD(day, 45, c.XDTE_0)
                WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 3 THEN DATEADD(day, 15, c.XDTE_0)
            END THEN 
                CASE 
                    WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 1 THEN DATEADD(month, 3, c.XDTE_0)
                    WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 2 THEN DATEADD(day, 45, c.XDTE_0)
                    WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 3 THEN DATEADD(day, 15, c.XDTE_0)
                END
            ELSE 
                CASE 
                    WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 1 THEN DATEADD(month, 6, c.XDTE_0)
                    WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 2 THEN DATEADD(month, 3, c.XDTE_0)
                    WHEN pe.LANNUM_0 = 3 THEN DATEADD(day, 30, c.XDTE_0)
                END
        END
    ) <= 15
  AND s.XFLG_0=2

ORDER BY jours_restants ASC, niveau_notification DESC;
